---
title: "Author Manager"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

The Author Manager is a single-page application that runs entirely in your browser. Your data is saved to `localStorage`; nothing is sent to a server.

::: {.callout-tip}
**The recommended workflow** — fill in your own block first, set yourself as **Corresponding author**, then click **Generate invitation link**. Send the link to each coauthor by email. They land on a simplified form, fill in their details, and click **Send to corresponding author** — their email client opens with a JSON payload addressed to you. Paste each reply into the *Coauthor entries* panel for review.
:::

<iframe class="af-tool-frame"
        src="tool/index.html"
        title="ordenaR Author Manager"
        loading="lazy"
        allow="clipboard-write">
</iframe>

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Open the tool in a new tab

If the embedded tool feels cramped, [open it standalone](tool/index.html){target="_blank"}.
:::

## Tips & shortcuts

- **Drag the `⋮⋮` handle** on the left of any author card to reorder authors (only when sort mode is "Manual").
- **Sort mode** has two settings: Manual and Alphabetical (by last name). When you switch back to manual, the current displayed order is frozen as the new manual order.
- **ORCID validation** is live; a green ✓ means the checksum (ISO 7064 MOD 11-2) is valid.
- **Affiliation deduplication** is automatic: if two authors share an exact-match institution + city + country + department, they get the same superscript.
- The output panel updates as you type. Try switching the format dropdown — your data is the same; only the rendering changes.
- The **Coauthor entries** panel detects the `BEGIN/END ORDENAR ENTRY` markers in pasted email text, so you can paste the entire email body and it will extract the JSON.
